definition: Rank airport-hours by residual operational state score; evaluate decile lift, residual monotonicity, and top-decile risk.
Predict the probability that scheduled arrivals in an airport-hour include arrivals delayed at least 60 min; evaluate AUC, PR-AUC, calibration, Brier score, and lift.
Predict the probability that scheduled arrivals in an airport-hour include cancellations; evaluate AUC, PR-AUC, calibration, Brier score, and lift.
Detect elevated disruption in post-advisory and clean-lag windows after advisory end.
Aggregate airport-hour outcomes to GDP or GS advisory events and compare with matched non-advisory windows.
